function.name: get_sunrise_sunset_time
function.description: Get sunrise and sunset times for a city.
function.long_description: Retrieves sunrise and sunset timing details for a specified city using an external weather API.

city.description: Name of the city to get sunrise and sunset information for

example_user_queries: What time is sunrise and sunset in Bengaluru?
Show sunrise and sunset times for New York.
Get today’s sunrise and sunset for London.
Tell me the sunrise and sunset time in Tokyo.
Fetch sunrise and sunset details for Sydney.
What are the sunrise and sunset times for Dubai?
Show the sun timings for Toronto.
Get sunrise and sunset information for Singapore.
Check sunrise and sunset for San Francisco.
Return sunrise and sunset using city Paris.
